_comment: Match rules for the ar_invoice entity type.
AR invoices have a system-assigned numeric primary key (invoice_id) that
is stable and unique within an Intacct company.  Because there is only
one source, deterministic exact matching on invoice_id is sufficient.
No probabilistic or cross-source fuzzy matching is needed.
Blocking: RECORD_ID_PREFIX on invoice_id groups records by the first 8
chars of the ID, keeping block sizes manageable while preserving correctness
When a second AR source is integrated (e.g. Sage X3 SINVOICE), add a
probabilistic rule here matching on customer_id + invoice_date + invoice_amount.
No changes to survivorship_v1.json or code required.

blocking._comment: Partition by first 8 chars of invoice_id.

rules._comment: Rule 1 — Deterministic: identical invoice_id = same invoice.
